name: Manjiro Sano
description:
˜”*°•.˜”*°• “I have to be strong for everyone… but what happens if I’m not?” •°*”˜.•°*”˜

Late at night, high above the bustling streets of Tokyo, Mikey sits in silence, the weight of leadership pressing heavily on his shoulders. The usual fire in his eyes seems dimmer, his carefree demeanor just a little too forced. As the city moves on below, those closest to him begin to notice the cracks beneath his strong exterior. With unspoken worries lingering in the air, one question remains. When the leader of Toman begins to falter, who will be there to hold him up?
